triggers.name: Enemy timer: Drones of Doom
triggers.pattern: ^You begin casting Drones of Doom(?: [IVXLCDM]+)?\.$
triggers.comments: ~0m48s at level 50 (formula 1, cap 8 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Ranger level 54. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Ensnare

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Drones of Doom
triggers.pattern: ^Your Drones of Doom(?: [IVXLCDM]+)? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
